utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items in the required format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all six sections. Now check if each is fully specified with details: 1) property: includes address, price, type, size, features, viewing_date — sufficient details and price. 2) financing: includes mortgage_amount, interest_rate, down_payment, lender, contact, rate_lock — terms are provided. 3) legal_services: provider, service, cost, case_number, contact — costs included. 4) moving_services: provider, service, cost, contact, status — costs included. 5) setup_services: utilities package with provider, service, cost, contact, includes, timeline; plus property_survey with provider, service, cost, contact, scheduled — utility and setup services included. 6) total_budget: includes property_price, service_costs, total_investment, breakdown — complete cost breakdown. All items are present and fully specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final solution includes specific selections that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings: a property choice (3-bedroom townhouse purchase), a financing choice (a traditional mortgage arrangement akin to 'Traditional Mortgage'), legal services ('Premium Legal Package'), a property survey ('Full Structural Survey'), moving services ('Standard Moving'), and utility setup ('Premium Utilities'). For each of these, I mapped the named or clearly corresponding item to its exact rating from the ground-truth list.
